title: Sprint planning store-write verification loop
description: Agents executing architect_sprint_plan.md must verify that every write to the Forge store succeeds. If a PreToolUse hook rejects a write due to a schema violation, the agent must parse the error, correct the JSON, and retry — halting all further progress until the write is confirmed successful.

implementation.objective: Add store-write verification loop to meta-sprint-plan workflow so agents retry on schema violations
key_changes: Added Store-Write Verification section to meta-sprint-plan.md
Updated Algorithm steps 4 and 5 with inline retry instructions for every store write
Added Generation Instruction requiring verification section in generated workflows

review_plan.objective: Review the plan for adding store-write verification loop to meta-sprint-plan.md
findings: Plan correctly identifies the gap: no retry instructions for failed store writes in sprint-plan workflow
Approach is additive and low-risk: documentation/workflow content change only
All store-write points in algorithm steps 4 and 5 annotated with retry instructions
Generation Instructions correctly require verification section in generated workflows
Acceptance criterion #4 partially met: meta-orchestrate.md has equivalent Write-Boundary Contract but not identical Store-Write Verification section
Version bump not declared in plan but will be handled at sprint release engineering
No security concerns: Markdown-only change, no executable code

code_review.objective: Code review of store-write verification loop addition to meta-sprint-plan.md
findings: Implementation matches the approved plan exactly — documentation-only change

All four store-write points in Algorithm steps 4 and 5 have inline retry instructions
Generation Instructions correctly require verification section in generated workflows
No executable code changes — only Markdown meta-workflow content

structure-manifest.json correctly regenerated by build-manifest.cjs
